summary: Enthusiastic New Year's Eve show with special guests, but recording details are unclear
review: The reviewer describes this concert as a memorable New Year's celebration featuring surprise guests and the rare chance to meet Bill Graham, making it a standout experience despite the cold Bay Area weather. No information about the source or audio clarity was provided, so the recording quality remains unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, which is generally positive (4 stars) about the performance but offers no insight into audio fidelity; rating reflects good show quality with unknown recording quality.
